SG Abramovich, VA Drobyshev, AE Pyatova… - Journal of Stroke and …, 2026
After a thorough investigation, the Editor has concluded that the acceptance of this
article was based upon the positive advice of one unreliable reviewer report. The
report was submitted from an email account which was provided to the journal as a …

I Karunarathna

lateral sclerosis, with management options that include anticholinergic agents,
botulinum toxin injection, or radiation therapy. Diaphragm plication is an option in …

In patients with symptomatic nasal congestion and rhinorrhea, thorough history and
allergy testing can often elucidate a cause for rhinitis. Various treatment options exist
for allergic and non-allergic rhinitis patients with symptoms refractory to …

Ayurveda considers CP under Vatavyadhi caused by Vata imbalance. …

a rare clinical condition. A two-year-old male crossbreed cat, raised in a farm …
